extraction._jpeg_quality_note: 1=best quality/largest files, 31=worst/smallest. Value 2 = near-lossless (large temp files). Recommended: 5-8 for balanced quality/speed

filter._blur_note: Laplacian variance. Lower = more frames removed. Recommended: 60-120
filter._similarity_note: pHash similarity 0.0-1.0. Frames >= this are considered duplicate. 0.70 = keep frames 30%+ different
filter._dedup_method_note: phash=fast (recommended), ssim=slower but more accurate (use for <500 frames)
filter._phash_size_note: pHash grid size. Higher = more precise but slower. Valid range: 8-32. At hash_size=16, hash is 256 bits and max Hamming distance is 256

scorer._enabled_note: Set true to score frames aesthetically and select top-N after filtering
scorer._top_n_note: How many best-scoring frames to copy into top_frames/ folder
